What We Do

Tax Strategy for Real Estate Investors

Every property, every structure, every strategy — engineered for maximum after-tax return and long-term portfolio growth.

1031 Like-Kind Exchanges

Defer capital gains indefinitely by rolling proceeds into replacement property. We handle timeline management, qualified intermediaries, identification rules, and reverse exchanges.

Cost Segregation Studies

Accelerate depreciation by reclassifying building components to shorter recovery periods. Major first-year tax savings.

Rental Property Tax

Schedule E optimization, passive loss planning, grouping elections, and deductions most CPAs miss.

Real Estate Professional Status

Qualify for REPS to unlock unlimited passive loss offsets against ordinary income — documentation and planning.

Short-Term Rental Tax

Airbnb and STR loophole strategy — material participation, average-stay tests, and non-passive treatment.

Opportunity Zone Investments

Defer and reduce capital gains through Qualified Opportunity Funds — structuring, compliance, and exit planning.

Track Record

Numbers That Compound

Real tax savings for real portfolios. No hypotheticals, no projections.

About

Investor-First.
Strategy-Led.

We work exclusively with real estate investors — from first-time rental owners to syndicators managing nine-figure portfolios. No small-business bookkeeping, no 1040 production line.

Every engagement starts with a portfolio review and a written tax strategy. You get a clear roadmap before any work begins, with fixed fees and no surprise bills.

How It Works

From Portfolio to Strategy

Three steps. Clear scope. Measurable tax savings.

1

Portfolio Review

We review your current holdings, entity structure, prior returns, and investment goals to identify opportunities.

2

Written Strategy

Custom tax plan with projected savings, timeline, and fixed fees — delivered before we begin execution.

3

Execution & Ongoing

We implement the strategy, file the returns, and meet quarterly to adapt as your portfolio grows.

Client Reviews

What Investors Say

“
The cost seg study on our 48-unit acquisition generated $410k in first-year deductions. Their team handled the whole thing and the ROI on fees was nearly 20x.

“
I run 8 short-term rentals. They qualified us for the STR loophole, unlocked $128k in passive losses against W-2 income. Best tax decision we ever made.

8-Property Portfolio

Retired last year with 12 rental properties. They walked me through four consecutive 1031 exchanges and deferred over $1.6M in capital gains. Unmatched expertise.
